description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped lot, surrounded by a perimeter of evenly spaced trees and bordered by paved driveways and walkways. The house features a flat roof with a central living area, large windows, and a visible outdoor pool or patio area at the rear. The front approach is marked by a wide driveway leading to the main entrance, flanked by manicured lawns and decorative shrubs. The property is enclosed on three sides by rows of trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The exterior walls appear to be finished in light-colored materials, with darker accents on the roof and window frames. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between the house, driveway, and green spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow surrounded by trees, paved driveways, and a rear pool or patio area. The property features large windows, manicured lawns, and a spacious, open layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical tree-lined border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, side lawn, and partial view of the rear pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool or patio area, backyard, and the house's flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear and side green spaces, with the driveway visible on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
